docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $350.00 SERVED JUN-10-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STAVER, SARI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GERACE, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STAVER, SARI $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,425.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,228.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CAL CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,530.92 ACCRUED INTEREST, $240.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT STAVER, SARI
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERACE, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT STAVER, SARI
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $730.66 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT STAVER, SARI
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT STAVER, SARI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAITNIFFF JOHN GERACE IS PRESENT VIA COURT CALL. DEFENDANT SARI STAVER IS NOT PRESENT. NO PLAINTIFF RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
